prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年复旦大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约1295名→2335名→2393名→2684名→4096名，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2024至2025年单年后移约1412名，后移幅度显著扩大；2025年基准位次约4096名；复旦大学在上海市综合类招生计划持续扩增：2021年51人、2022年54人、2023年79人、2024年97人、2025年104人；2026年招生计划进一步增至144人，较2025年扩招约38.5%，扩招幅度显著，对位次有后移作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列全国第5名，属顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风及学校管理类事件（共14件，负面5件、中性9件），但抖音综合热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量极高，表明社会关注度依然旺盛；历史投档异常信号方面，2021–2023年均有中高关注度记录，但主要涉及外省而非上海本地；复旦大学拥有A+学科11个（数学、新闻传播学、政治学、物理学、生物学、中国史、中国语言文学、哲学、理论经济学、马克思主义理论、公共卫生与预防医学），A学科10个，A-学科7个，A-及以上共计28个，学科实力居全国前列，对考生报考意愿有正向支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度为高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学为推荐，法学、金融/财经/经济为分化观望，新闻传播为明显劝退；复旦大学相关招生专业覆盖上述热门方向，对高分考生吸引力强。上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，竞争显著加剧；复旦大学位于上海市，为本省唯一一所软科前5的顶尖高校，本地考生报考意愿强烈；2025年本地招生计划104人，2026年扩至144人，本地生源受益明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招约38.5%、上海市考生总数显著增加约35.4%以及学校声誉偏负面等因素，扩招对位次的后移作用与考生增加带来的竞争加剧大致对冲，但考生增幅略高于扩招幅度，叠加学校顶尖层次和热门专业吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准4096名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约5071名，区间4571–5571名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（数学智能英才班）
- 计算机科学与技术（拔尖人才试验班）
- 经济学类（含数理经济拔尖班）
- 法学（含涉外法治拔尖人才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（相辉学堂香农计划）
- 新闻传播学类（含望道新闻卓越班）
- 经济管理试验班（统计、运筹与AI）
- 工科试验班（计算与智能创新学院）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 中国语言文学类（含博雅班）
- 历史学类（含历史学博雅班）
- 英语（含翻译专业）
- 社会科学试验班（国务学院/社政学院）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5071名，区间4571–5571名。位次在区间下限4571名以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（数学、计算机、经济学、法学）；位次在区间中段5071名附近建议以二档为主（工科试验班、新闻传播学类、经济管理试验班），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限5571名附近建议以三档保底（中国语言文学类、历史学类、英语、社会科学试验班），同时争取二档专业。复旦大学各专业学科评估整体顶尖，即使三档专业也多为A+学科，报考价值极高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Fudan University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 1295 → 2335 → 2393 → 2684 → 4096, showing a continuous backward trend, especially from 2024 to 2025 with a single-year backward shift of about 1412 places, significantly widening the decline; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4096; Fudan University's enrollment plan in Shanghai's comprehensive category has been continuously expanding: 51 in 2021, 54 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 97 in 2024, 104 in 2025; the 2026 enrollment plan further increases to 144, an expansion of about 38.5% compared to 2025, a significant increase that will push rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 5th nationally in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier university level, strongly attracting high-scoring students; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents (14 total, 5 negative, 9 neutral), but its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, indicating sustained social attention; historical abnormal admission signals show medium to high attention records from 2021 to 2023, but mainly involving other provinces rather than Shanghai locally; Fudan University has 11 A+ disciplines (Mathematics, Journalism and Communication, Political Science, Physics, Biology, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Theoretical Economics, Marxist Theory, Public Health and Preventive Medicine), 10 A disciplines, 7 A- disciplines, totaling 28 disciplines at A- or above, placing its academic strength among the top in the country, positively supporting candidates' willingness to apply.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended with high social heat, clinical medicine and stomatology are recommended, law, finance/economics are divided and wait-and-see, journalism and communication are clearly discouraged; Fudan University's related enrollment majors cover these popular directions, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. The total number of college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, the only top-5 Soft Science university in the province, with strong local candidates' willingness to apply; the local enrollment plan was 104 in 2025 and expands to 144 in 2026, benefiting local students significantly.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of about 38.5% in 2026, the notable increase of about 35.4% in the total number of Shanghai candidates, and the somewhat negative school reputation, the backward effect of enrollment expansion on rankings and the intensified competition from increased candidates roughly offset each other, but the candidate increase rate is slightly higher than the expansion rate, combined with the top-tier school level and popular major attractiveness, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 4096; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5071, with a range of 4571–5571.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Mathematics (Mathematics Intelligence Elite Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top Talent Experimental Class)
- Economics (Including Mathematical Economics Top Class)
- Law (Including International Rule of Law Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan)
- Journalism and Communication (Including Wangdao Journalism Excellence Class)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Statistics, Operations Research and AI)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Innovation College).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Including Boya Class)
- History (Including History Boya Class)
- English (Including Translation Major)
- Social Science Experimental Class (School of International Relations and Public Affairs/School of Social Development and Public Policy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 5071, range 4571–5571. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 4571 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Mathematics, Computer Science, Economics, Law); candidates with rankings around the midpoint of 5071 are advised to focus on Tier 2 (Engineering Experimental Class, Journalism and Communication, Economics and Management Experimental Class), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of 5571 are advised to use Tier 3 as a safety net (Chinese Language and Literature, History, English, Social Science Experimental Class), while striving for Tier 2 majors. Fudan University's various majors are overall top-tier in discipline evaluations, and even Tier 3 majors are mostly A+ disciplines, offering extremely high application value.
